Blast the labeled asteroid that matches the live physics prompt. Keyboard or touch controls ready.

Clear the concept asteroid. Wrong targets relaunch the wave.

Flight Controls

Drift with Arrow keys or A / D. Fire with Space. Touch controls stay visible for demos on tablets and phones.

The latest correct hit for each wave earns the reviewed score inside Lantern.
